description: Environment setup: install project dependencies including the new rapidfuzz library, and verify the existing test suite passes as a baseline.
steps: Run 'pip install -e ".[gui,dev]"' in /projects/sandbox/Salesforce-Translation-Handler to install current dependencies
Run 'pip install rapidfuzz' to install the fuzzy matching library
Run 'pytest -q' to confirm all 203 existing tests pass as a baseline
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q runs all existing tests and they pass
findings: All 203 tests pass. Python 3.9 is the runtime (not 3.11). rapidfuzz 3.13.0 installed successfully. Use python3 or the full path for python commands (pyenv python not globally set).
